articles.title: PIL seeks ethanol blend disclosure at fuel pumps
articles.description: A Supreme Court petition demands transparency in ethanol-blended petrol distribution. It seeks display of ethanol percentages on fuel nozzles and bills. The petition also requests a vehicle compatibility database for various ethanol blends. It aims to protect consumers from potential vehicle damage and warranty issues. An expert committee is proposed to study E20 compatibility and its implications.

articles.title: Dewas fuel stations launch advisories amid E20 fuel concerns
articles.description: Dewas petrol pumps issue advisories urging motorists to clean fuel tanks during monsoon amid E20 concerns, as some report moisture-related fuel system issues.

articles.title: NY Fed says supply chain pressures eased in June
articles.description: Global supply chain pressures eased in June, with the New York Fed index falling to 1.25 as Middle East disruptions showed signs of easing. Improved transit through the Strait of Hormuz and softer oil prices are expected to moderate inflation, though logistics bottlenecks and supplier delays continue to signal residual strain.
